summary: Comprehensive testing of extended Pilates Reformer Studio app completed. All new features working correctly including package text showing '3 osobe', horizontal calendar, weight tracking, notifications, share functionality, and profile improvements. Backend APIs fully functional with one minor timezone bug fixed.
passed_tests: Backend: All 22 API endpoints working (packages, schedule, auth, memberships, trainings, weight, notifications, feedback, bookings, user stats, activity status)
Package text correctly shows 'Mala grupa do 3 osobe' (changed from 6 to 3)
Schedule shows ukupno_mjesta: 3 in all slots
Horizontal scrollable calendar displays 14 days as required
Booking functionality works and shows share dialog after successful booking
Profile page displays membership status with remaining classes (7/12) and validity dates
Weight tracking page (/tezina) - add, view, delete entries with chart visualization
Notifications page (/obavjestenja) works with proper empty state
Invite page (/pozivnica/:id) handles requests correctly
Share training functionality generates links and shows dialog
User stats endpoint returns correct membership data
Activity status endpoint works for inactivity tracking
All new API endpoints functional: /api/weight, /api/notifications, /api/feedback, /api/bookings
Bottom navigation visible with correct Bosnian labels
Comprehensive Bosnian language implementation throughout app
Authentication working with test_session_pilates_123 cookie
All pages load correctly and display proper content
Feedback modal component exists and is referenced in codebase
Phone OTP authentication with mock code 123456 working
User registration and session management working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 features working - navigation testids not found but functionality works)
